title: Silky Comforting Croatian Yogurt Soup
description: A fermented, silky, comforting Croatian soup enriched with garam masala, low-sugar and high-protein for a warm lunch.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a medium pot over medium heat. Add onion, carrot, celery, and garlic; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Sprinkle garam masala and smoked paprika over the vegetables, stir to coat, and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in the vegetable broth, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes to meld flavors.
In a small bowl whisk the yogurt with lemon juice until smooth. Set aside.
Carefully ladle about 1 cup of the hot broth into the yogurt mixture while whisking; this tempering prevents curdling.
Return the tempered yogurt to the pot, stirring gently. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes, just until heated through (do not boil).
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then stir in chopped dill.
Ladle soup into bowls, drizzle a little extra olive oil if desired, and serve hot.
